{"credits": [{"type": "coordinator", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5673677?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/mtrezza", "id": 5673677, "login": "mtrezza", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU2NzM2Nzc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/mtrezza", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55778", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-434", "name": "Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type"}], "description": "### Impact

Parse Server's default `fileUpload.fileExtensions` blocklist is intended to prevent uploading files that browsers render as active content (such as HTML and SVG), which can be used to perform stored cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks against other users. The blocklist could be bypassed by uploading a file whose extension is not an exact match of a blocked extension (for example a non-standard or compound extension) together with a dangerous content type. On storage adapters that persist and serve the uploaded content type (such as S3 and GCS), the file is then served with the attacker-supplied content type, enabling stored XSS against users who open the file URL.

This affects the default configuration, in which authenticated users are allowed to upload files. The default GridFS/filesystem adapter sets the `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff` response header, which mitigates browser rendering on that adapter, but the upload restriction itself is still bypassed. This is an incomplete-fix follow-up of GHSA-vr5f-2r24-w5hc and GHSA-7wqv-xjf3-x35v.

### Patches

The file upload extension validation now also evaluates the request content type against the configured blocklist whenever the filename's extension is not a recognized type. As a result, a dangerous content type can no longer be preserved by uploading a file with a non-standard extension, and such uploads are rejected.

### Workarounds

Configure `fileUpload.fileExtensions` as a strict allowlist of only the file extensions your application needs (for example `["^(png|jpe?g|gif|pdf)$"]`) instead of relying on the default blocklist. Additionally, serve uploaded files from a separate domain than the application, so that any executed content is isolated from the application's origin.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00406, "percentile": 0.32592}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:36:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55778"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:36:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/parse-community/parse-server/security/advisories/GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93", "https://github.com/parse-community/parse-server/pull/10505", "https://github.com/parse-community/parse-server/pull/10506", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/parse-community/parse-server/security-advisories/GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/parse-community/parse-server", "summary": "parse-server: Stored XSS via non-standard file extension bypassing file upload extension blocklist", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:36:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8x7-r927-cc93", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.9.1-alpha.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "parse-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 9.0.0, < 9.9.1-alpha.11"}, {"first_patched_version": "8.6.81", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "parse-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 8.6.80"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: parse-server: Stored XSS via non-standard file extension bypassing file upload extension blocklist
